description: Initialize project with Cadre context-driven development

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Call `cadre_project` with `action: "ping"` to confirm MCP availability.

Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "setup"`, the root candidate, structured `product`, optional `productGuidelines`, optional `workflowPolicy`, and `techStack` JSON fields. Use the returned setup review artifacts and native state summary for the user review.
Use the returned doctor report, workspace diagnostics, dependency graph, LSP evidence, template inventory, and selected JSON style guides.
Present returned setup review artifacts using the review_bundle manifest/path list so large generated Markdown projections do not enter model context.
When the user confirms the setup payload and review artifacts, call `cadre_workflow` again with `workflow: "setup"`, `execute: true`, and `humanConfirmed: true`.
Summarize created canonical JSON/JSONL files, generated human projections, selected code style guides, native state initialization, warnings, and next packet.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
